tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstanceProvisioningSettingsFetch
tools.description: Get instance provisioning settings for a given project. This is hidden method used by UI only.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesCreate
tools.description: Create an Instance.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesDetachLun
tools.description: Detach LUN from Instance.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesDisableInteractiveSerialConsole
tools.description: Disable the interactive serial console feature on an instance.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesEnableInteractiveSerialConsole
tools.description: Enable the interactive serial console feature on an instance.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesList
tools.description: List servers in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesReset
tools.description: Perform an ungraceful, hard reset on a server. Equivalent to shutting the power off and then turning it back on.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesStart
tools.description: Starts a server that was shutdown.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsInstancesStop
tools.description: Stop a running server.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsNetworksList
tools.description: List network in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsNetworksListNetworkUsage
tools.description: List all Networks (and used IPs for each Network) in the vendor account associated with the specified project.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsNfsSharesCreate
tools.description: Create an NFS share.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsNfsSharesList
tools.description: List NFS shares.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsProvisioningConfigsCreate
tools.description: Create new ProvisioningConfig.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsProvisioningConfigsSubmit
tools.description: Submit a provisiong configuration for a given project.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsProvisioningQuotasList
tools.description: List the budget details to provision resources on a given project.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsSshKeysCreate
tools.description: Register a public SSH key in the specified project for use with the interactive serial console feature.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsSshKeysList
tools.description: Lists the public SSH keys registered for the specified project. These SSH keys are used only for the interactive serial console feature.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesList
tools.description: List storage volumes in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesLunsEvict
tools.description: Skips lun's cooloff and deletes it now. Lun must be in cooloff state.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesLunsList
tools.description: List storage volume luns for given storage volume.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesPatch
tools.description: Update details of a single storage volume.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesRename
tools.description: RenameVolume sets a new name for a volume. Use with caution, previous names become immediately invalidated.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesResize
tools.description: Emergency Volume resize.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesSnapshotsCreate
tools.description: Takes a snapshot of a boot volume. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesSnapshotsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a volume snapshot. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesSnapshotsGet
tools.description: Returns the specified snapshot resource. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesSnapshotsList
tools.description: Retrieves the list of snapshots for the specified volume. Returns a response with an empty list of snapshots if called for a non-boot volume.

tools.name: projects.baremetalsolutionProjectsLocationsVolumesSnapshotsRestoreVolumeSnapshot
tools.description: Uses the specified snapshot to restore its parent volume. Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if called for a non-boot volume.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
